variant: Mohawk Mobile Jack Stands - 20,000 / 30,000 / 40,000 lb capacities

installation_requirements.surface: Hard, level surface capable of sustaining the load

optional_equipment.description: Optional yoke pads for axle engagement instead of flat rubber pads

safety_features: Mechanical locking at adjustable height positions
Fine thread adjustment for precise height setting
Stable base design for load distribution
Must be used on hard, level surfaces
notes: Jack stands are standalone support devices, not lifting devices
Used in conjunction with vehicle lifts for additional support
